description: Sanitized HTTP 404 policy/error marker payloads. Captures two distinct 404 failure modes: (1) policy-driven content failure where a higher layer rejected the response, (2) transport-level 404 with empty body. Both carry only a marker field for assertion; no real response bodies.

cases.scenario: Upstream policy layer rejected content despite a non-404 transport; modeled here as a 404 marker for parity with the legacy Reader-Core sample.
cases.expected_behavior: Rule engine should surface POLICY_CONTENT_FAILED marker to the host; no content extraction attempted.

cases.scenario: Transport returned a literal 404 with an empty body; the marker is the only signal available for the rule engine to branch on.
cases.expected_behavior: Rule engine should short-circuit content extraction and emit HTTP_404_CONTENT_FAILED marker.
